mapper.sql: city_cost_id, country, city, saving_cost, common_cost, premium_cost, created_date, created_nm, modified_date, modified_nm, del_yn
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM city_cost WHERE del_yn = 'N'
AND country = #{country}
ORDER BY country, city

SELECT
FROM city_cost WHERE del_yn = 'N' AND city = #{city} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO travel_goal (user_id, title, departure, destination, is_domestic, style, start_date, end_date, total_budget, status, created_date, created_nm, del_yn) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{departure}, #{destination}, #{isDomestic}, #{style}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{totalBudget}, #{status}, NOW(), #{createdNm}, 'N')
mapper.sql: goal_id, user_id, title, departure, destination, is_domestic, style, start_date, end_date, total_budget, places, benefits, package_id, status, created_date, created_nm, modified_date, modified_nm, del_yn
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM travel_goal WHERE del_yn = 'N' AND goal_id = #{goalId}
mapper.sql: cost_id, goal_id, flight_cost, hotel_cost, living_cost, total_cost, remaining_budget, created_date, created_nm, modified_date, modified_nm, del_yn
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO travel_cost (goal_id, flight_cost, hotel_cost, living_cost, total_cost, remaining_budget, created_date, created_nm, del_yn) VALUES (#{goalId}, #{flightCost}, #{hotelCost}, #{livingCost}, #{totalCost}, #{remainingBudget}, NOW(), #{createdNm}, 'N')
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM travel_cost WHERE del_yn = 'N' AND goal_id = #{goalId} ORDER BY cost_id DESC LIMIT 1
